sentence: 父母要提醒孩子不要和陌生人裸聊。
pinyin: Fùmǔ yào tíxǐng háizi bù yào hé mòshēng rén luǒ liáo.
english: Parents should remind their children not to have naked video chats with strangers.

sentence: 这件事自有公论，不用争了。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì zì yǒu gōng lùn, bù yòng zhēng le.
english: Public opinion will sort this out — no need to argue.

sentence: 他在海事局工作了十年。
pinyin: Tā zài hǎi shì jú gōng zuò le shí nián.
english: He has worked at the maritime affairs bureau for ten years.

sentence: 他在剧中扮演了一个重要的脚色。
pinyin: Tā zài jù zhōng bàn yǎn le yī gè zhòng yào de jiǎo sè.
english: He played an important role in the play.

sentence: 村里新买了几台农机，省了不少人力。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ xīn mǎi le jǐ tái nóng jī, shěng le bù shǎo rén lì.
english: The village bought several new pieces of agricultural machinery, saving a lot of labor.
